summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA backend-frontend integration. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend Research view functional with pattern detection, chart rendering, and layer toggles working. Minor issues found with pattern toggle behavior.

ui_bugs.issue: Patterns toggle only partially hides pattern elements - removes pattern label but BEARISH bias still visible

passed_tests: Backend APIs - 100% success rate (7/7 endpoints working)
TA Setup API - Returns descending_channel pattern with 76% confidence
Frontend Research view loading and navigation
Chart rendering with pattern geometry (trendlines visible)
Setup Debug panel showing all data correctly
Detected Elements section displaying patterns, structure, levels
Symbol search dropdown with BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP options
Timeframe switching with API recalculation (confidence values update)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix pattern toggle functionality - currently only hides pattern label but not the BEARISH bias overlay. Pattern geometry (trendlines) should also be completely hidden when patterns toggle is OFF.
